text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During lunch, I spot Daiwa Scarlet looking
flustered.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it! Ugh... This doesn't make sense! I
don't even eat that much!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So why does my uniform feel so tight? Trainer! I
need to do some training, pronto!
choice_data_list: Time to burn off those calories!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Grrrrrr! That's the plan, you carrot-brain! Just
don't say it out loud!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After exercising furiously—in both senses of the
word—Daiwa Scarlet successfully returns to her
usual weight.
